weekly picks (May 4 week 2026)

Posted on May 25, 2026 in 2026may,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 May 4th week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

05/26

  1. s41467-026-73382-9 Giant spin-orbit magnetic state readout enhanced by a magnetic tunnel junction (Nature Communications)

  2. s41467-026-73709-6 Directing intermediate phase crystallographic orientation promotes carbon-based CsPbI3 perovskite solar cells to beyond 20% efficiency (Nature Communications)
